name: edtNutriTrack
oneLineDescription: AI-powered nutrition tracking application for simplified meal logging and dietary insights
whatItIs: NutriTrack is an AI-powered nutrition tracking application designed to help users easily log meals, understand their dietary habits, and improve overall health. The product focuses on speed, simplicity, and intelligent automation to reduce the friction typically associated with food tracking.
crossCuttingPrinciples: Mobile-first approach using React Native architecture
Speed and simplicity to reduce friction in food tracking
AI automation to minimize manual input requirements
Free tier with limited AI usage, premium tier with unlimited AI features
specSummary: NutriTrack is an AI-powered nutrition tracking application that simplifies meal logging and provides dietary insights for users looking to improve their health. The product targets individuals managing weight, fitness enthusiasts tracking macros, busy users needing quick logging solutions, and nutrition beginners. Core functionality centers around meal logging through both manual entry and AI photo recognition, with automatic food identification and calorie estimation. The application tracks daily calories and macronutrients, displays progress through charts and summaries, and provides personalized nutrition feedback and suggestions. Built with a mobile-first React Native approach using Node.js backend and PostgreSQL database, the system integrates OpenAI for food recognition and follows a freemium model with basic manual logging in the free tier and unlimited AI features in premium. The MVP focuses on user authentication, basic meal logging, calorie tracking, and a simple dashboard with one AI feature, while excluding advanced meal planning, analytics, and social features for post-MVP development.
